summary: End-to-end backend + frontend testing of EngLearn.ai. 11/11 pytest backend tests passed (auth, scenarios, sessions, chat with grammar correction, TTS). Frontend signup -> dashboard -> scenario card -> chat happy path works fully: Maya replies and the terracotta GENTLE CORRECTION block renders with original/corrected/tip for 'I go to school yesterday'.

minor.issue: Not tested via pytest (needs real audio upload); endpoint reachable, frontend posts webm. Recommend a small fixture audio file in future runs.

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid="maya-orb" not found on the orb element (count=0). Orb is visually rendered correctly but lacks the documented testid.

issues: Two near-duplicate Maya greeting bubbles appear before the user's first message (initial greeting is re-rendered). Cosmetic but noticeable.

action_items: Add data-testid="maya-orb" to the orb element on Chat page
Investigate duplicate initial Maya greeting in chat transcript
Optional: add an STT fixture audio file for /api/voice/transcribe coverage
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/chat builds an unused first LlmChat with history replay then creates a second LlmChat for the real call - dead code that wastes LLM tokens/time. Remove the first chat_client block.
server.py: 5xx detail strings include raw exception text from LLM/TTS calls; consider sanitising before returning to clients.
JWT secret has a sensible default but exp uses naive UTC via timezone-aware datetimes (OK). No refresh endpoint - acceptable for MVP.
test_credentials: Dynamic signup per run (uitest_<ts>@englearn.ai / pass1234). Seeded user from memory: test@englearn.ai / pass1234 (not pre-created in DB; created on demand).
seed_data_creation: Each backend test run creates a fresh user via /api/auth/signup; no manual seed required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_englearn_api.py covers full happy path including Claude grammar correction and OpenAI TTS - keep using REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env. Frontend chat happy path verified manually with Playwright: signup -> dashboard -> click 'Free Talk' scenario card -> /chat/:id -> send 'I go to school yesterday' -> assert GENTLE CORRECTION block appears. Maya orb element lacks data-testid="maya-orb".
